mapper.select: SELECT ID, EQUIP_ID, MODIFY_TYPE_CODE, MODIFY_TYPE_NAME, MODIFY_MANUFACTURER, MODIFY_TIME, MODIFY_CONTENT, MODIFY_REMARK, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, DELETE_BY, DELETE_BY_NAME, DELETE_TIME FROM E_M_EQPT_MODIFICATION WHERE ID = #{id} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO E_M_EQPT_MODIFICATION ( ID, EQUIP_ID, MODIFY_TYPE_CODE, MODIFY_TYPE_NAME, MODIFY_MANUFACTURER, MODIFY_TIME, MODIFY_CONTENT, MODIFY_REMARK, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{equipId}, #{modifyTypeCode}, #{modifyTypeName}, #{modifyManufacturer}, #{modifyTime}, #{modifyContent}, #{modifyRemark}, 0, #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update:
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_MODIFICATION
MODIFY_TYPE_CODE = #{modifyTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MODIFY_TYPE_NAME = #{modifyTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MODIFY_MANUFACTURER = #{modifyManufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MODIFY_TIME = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=DATE},
MODIFY_CONTENT = #{modifyContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MODIFY_REMARK = #{modifyRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = SYSDATE
WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE E_M_EQPT_MODIFICATION SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = SYSDATE WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE E_M_EQPT_MODIFICATION SET DEL_FLAG = 1, DELETE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DELETE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DELETE_TIME = SYSDATE WHERE ID IN
#{id}
